approvalTitle: Theme Layout Properties and Future View Preparation - Tasks
content:
# Tasks Document: Theme Layout Properties and Future View Preparation

## Phase 1: Create mixin files

- [ ] 1. Create three theme mixin files
  - Files: `lib/src/styles/mcal_event_tile_theme_mixin.dart` (new), `lib/src/styles/mcal_time_grid_theme_mixin.dart` (new), `lib/src/styles/mcal_all_day_theme_mixin.dart` (new)
  - Create `MCalEventTileThemeMixin` with 18 abstract getters: `eventTileBackgroundColor` (Color?), `eventTileTextStyle` (TextStyle?), `eventTileCornerRadius` (double?), `eventTileHorizontalSpacing` (double?), `eventTileBorderWidth` (double?), `eventTileBorderColor` (Color?), `hoverEventBackgroundColor` (Color?), `eventTileLightContrastColor` (Color?), `eventTileDarkContrastColor` (Color?), `weekNumberTextStyle` (TextStyle?), `weekNumberBackgroundColor` (Color?), `dropTargetTileBackgroundColor` (Color?), `dropTargetTileInvalidBackgroundColor` (Color?), `dropTargetTileCornerRadius` (double?), `dropTargetTileBorderColor` (Color?), `dropTargetTileBorderWidth` (double?), `resizeHandleColor` (Color?), `multiDayEventBackgroundColor` (Color?).
  - Create `MCalTimeGridThemeMixin` with 48 abstract getters: 37 existing time-grid properties (time legend, gridlines, current time, time regions, timed events, hover/focus, drop target overlay, other) + 11 new layout properties (`timeLegendLabelHeight`, `timedEventMargin`, `timedEventKeyboardFocusBorderWidth`, `timedEventCompactFontSize`, `timedEventNormalFontSize`, `timeRegionBorderWidth`, `timeRegionIconSize`, `timeRegionIconGap`, `resizeHandleVisualHeight`, `resizeHandleHorizontalMargin`, `resizeHandleBorderRadius`). See design doc MCalTimeGridThemeMixin tables for the complete list.
  - Create `MCalAllDayThemeMixin` with 17 abstract getters: 4 moved from parent (`allDayEventBackgroundColor`, `allDayEventTextStyle`, `allDayEventBorderColor`, `allDayEventBorderWidth`) + 4 moved from MCalDayThemeData (`allDayTileWidth`, `allDayTileHeight`, `allDayEventPadding`, `allDayOverflowIndicatorWidth`) + 9 new (`allDayWrapSpacing`, `allDayWrapRunSpacing`, `allDaySectionPadding`, `allDayKeyboardFocusBorderWidth`, `allDayOverflowHandleWidth`, `allDayOverflowHandleHeight`, `allDayOverflowHandleBorderRadius`, `allDayOverflowHandleGap`, `allDayOverflowIndicatorFontSize`).
  - Add dartdoc to each mixin explaining its role and which view theme classes should mix it in.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Component 1–3 property lists; existing property patterns in `mcal_day_theme_data.dart`._
  - _Requirements: 3.1, 4.1, 5.1_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Dart mixin developer. Task: Create three new mixin files in lib/src/styles/. (1) mcal_event_tile_theme_mixin.dart — mixin MCalEventTileThemeMixin with 18 abstract nullable getters (see design doc Component 1 for exact signatures). (2) mcal_time_grid_theme_mixin.dart — mixin MCalTimeGridThemeMixin with 48 abstract getters (37 existing time-grid properties from MCalDayThemeData + 11 new layout properties — see design doc MCalTimeGridThemeMixin tables for complete list with types). (3) mcal_all_day_theme_mixin.dart — mixin MCalAllDayThemeMixin with 17 abstract getters. Add dartdoc to each mixin. Import flutter/material.dart for Color, TextStyle, EdgeInsets, BoxDecoration types. Import MCalTimeLabelPosition enum if needed. Restrictions: Only abstract getters — no implementations, no fields, no methods. Keep each file well under 500 lines. Follow existing naming patterns. _Requirements: 3.1, 4.1, 5.1. Success: All three files compile cleanly; analyzer passes. Before implementing: set this task to in-progress [-] in tasks.md. After completing: run log-implementation with artifacts, then set task to complete [x]._

## Phase 2: Restructure theme classes

- [ ] 2. Rename and restructure MCalDayViewThemeData
  - File: `lib/src/styles/mcal_day_theme_data.dart` → rename to `lib/src/styles/mcal_day_view_theme_data.dart`
  - Rename class `MCalDayThemeData` → `MCalDayViewThemeData`.
  - Mix in `MCalEventTileThemeMixin`, `MCalTimeGridThemeMixin`, `MCalAllDayThemeMixin`.
  - Add `@override final` field declarations for all 83 mixin properties (18 + 48 + 17). The 37 existing time-grid properties and 4 existing all-day sizing properties remain as fields but now implement mixin getters. The 18 event-tile properties are new to this class (previously on parent or consolidated from both sub-themes). The 11 + 9 new layout properties are entirely new fields.
  - Retain 6 own properties: `dayHeaderDayOfWeekStyle`, `dayHeaderDateStyle`, `dayHeaderPadding` (new), `dayHeaderWeekNumberPadding` (new), `dayHeaderWeekNumberBorderRadius` (new), `dayHeaderSpacing` (new).
  - Update constructor with all 89 properties as named optional parameters.
  - Update `defaults(ThemeData)` factory to populate all 89 properties. New layout property defaults: `dayHeaderPadding: EdgeInsets.all(8.0)`, `dayHeaderWeekNumberPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6.0, vertical: 2.0)`, `dayHeaderWeekNumberBorderRadius: 4.0`, `dayHeaderSpacing: 8.0`, `allDayTileWidth: 120.0`, `allDayTileHeight: 28.0`, `allDayOverflowIndicatorWidth: 80.0`, plus all other new layout defaults per design doc tables. Event tile mixin defaults: `eventTileBorderWidth: 0.0`, `eventTileBorderColor: null`, `multiDayEventBackgroundColor: colorScheme.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.8)`, plus existing defaults for the 9 properties moved from parent.
  - Update `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode` to include all 89 properties.
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalDayThemeData patterns; design doc MCalEventTileThemeMixin, MCalTimeGridThemeMixin, MCalAllDayThemeMixin, and MCalDayViewThemeData tables._
  - _Requirements: 1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 3.2, 4.3, 5.3, 6.1, 6.2, 6.3, 6.4, 6.5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter theme developer. Task: (A) Rename file mcal_day_theme_data.dart → mcal_day_view_theme_data.dart. Rename class MCalDayThemeData → MCalDayViewThemeData. (B) Add mixin declarations: class MCalDayViewThemeData with MCalEventTileThemeMixin, MCalTimeGridThemeMixin, MCalAllDayThemeMixin. (C) Add @override final fields for all 83 mixin abstract getters. The 37 existing time-grid fields and 4 existing all-day sizing fields already exist — just add @override. The 18 event-tile properties are new fields. The 11 new TimeGrid layout + 9 new AllDay layout properties are new fields. (D) Add 4 new own fields (dayHeaderPadding, dayHeaderWeekNumberPadding, dayHeaderWeekNumberBorderRadius, dayHeaderSpacing). (E) Update constructor with all 89 named optional parameters. (F) Update defaults(ThemeData) — populate ALL properties; use design doc tables for exact default values. Key new defaults: dayHeaderPadding=EdgeInsets.all(8.0), dayHeaderSpacing=8.0, allDayTileWidth=120.0, allDayTileHeight=28.0, allDayOverflowIndicatorWidth=80.0, multiDayEventBackgroundColor=colorScheme.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.8), eventTileBorderWidth=0.0. (G) Update copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode for all 89 properties. Restrictions: Follow existing patterns exactly. This file will exceed 500 lines — accepted per design doc justification. _Requirements: 1.1–1.3, 3.2, 4.3, 5.3, 6.1–6.5. Success: Compiles; analyzer clean. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 3. Restructure MCalMonthThemeData
  - File: `lib/src/styles/mcal_month_theme_data.dart`
  - Mix in `MCalEventTileThemeMixin`.
  - Remove 9 directly-declared properties that are now satisfied by the mixin: `dropTargetTileBackgroundColor`, `dropTargetTileInvalidBackgroundColor`, `dropTargetTileCornerRadius`, `dropTargetTileBorderColor`, `dropTargetTileBorderWidth`, `resizeHandleColor`, `eventTileBorderColor`, `eventTileBorderWidth`, `multiDayEventBackgroundColor`. Replace them with `@override final` fields implementing the mixin getters (same names, same types — the fields stay, but they now satisfy the mixin contract).
  - Add `@override final` fields for the 9 remaining mixin properties that are new to MCalMonthThemeData: `eventTileBackgroundColor`, `eventTileTextStyle`, `eventTileCornerRadius`, `eventTileHorizontalSpacing`, `hoverEventBackgroundColor`, `eventTileLightContrastColor`, `eventTileDarkContrastColor`, `weekNumberTextStyle`, `weekNumberBackgroundColor`.
  - Add 16 new own layout properties: `dateLabelPadding`, `cellBorderWidth`, `regionContentPadding`, `regionIconSize`, `regionIconGap`, `regionFontSize`, `keyboardSelectionBorderWidth`, `keyboardHighlightBorderWidth`, `dateLabelCircleSize`, `weekNumberColumnWidth`, `weekNumberBorderWidth`, `weekdayHeaderPadding`, `multiDayTilePadding`, `multiDayTileBorderRadius`, `weekLayoutDateLabelPadding`, `weekLayoutBaseMargin`.
  - Update constructor, `defaults(ThemeData)` (populate all mixin + new layout properties with defaults per design doc), `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode`.
  - `defaults()` key values: `dropTargetTileBorderWidth: 1.5`, `resizeHandleColor: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.5)`, `multiDayEventBackgroundColor: colorScheme.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.8)`, `eventTileBorderWidth: 0.0`, plus all new layout defaults per design doc table.
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalMonthThemeData patterns; design doc MCalEventTileThemeMixin and MCalMonthThemeData tables._
  - _Requirements: 3.3, 3.4, 3.5, 3.6, 7.1, 7.2, 7.3, 7.4, 7.5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter theme developer. Task: (A) Add mixin: class MCalMonthThemeData with MCalEventTileThemeMixin. (B) The 9 existing directly-declared properties (dropTargetTile* ×5, resizeHandleColor, eventTileBorderColor, eventTileBorderWidth, multiDayEventBackgroundColor) already exist as fields — add @override to satisfy mixin. (C) Add 9 new @override final fields for the remaining mixin properties (eventTileBackgroundColor, eventTileTextStyle, eventTileCornerRadius, eventTileHorizontalSpacing, hoverEventBackgroundColor, eventTileLightContrastColor, eventTileDarkContrastColor, weekNumberTextStyle, weekNumberBackgroundColor). (D) Add 16 new own layout properties (see design doc MCalMonthThemeData new layout table for names, types, defaults). (E) Update constructor with all properties. (F) Update defaults() — populate all mixin + layout properties. Key: dropTargetTileBorderWidth=1.5, resizeHandleColor=Colors.white at 50% alpha, multiDayEventBackgroundColor=colorScheme.primary at 80% alpha, eventTileBorderWidth=0.0, dateLabelPadding=EdgeInsets.only(left: 4.0, top: 4.0, right: 4.0), cellBorderWidth=1.0, keyboardSelectionBorderWidth=2.0, keyboardHighlightBorderWidth=1.5, dateLabelCircleSize=24.0, weekNumberColumnWidth=36.0, weekNumberBorderWidth=0.5, multiDayTileBorderRadius=4.0, weekLayoutDateLabelPadding=2.0, weekLayoutBaseMargin=2.0. (G) Update copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode for all 62 properties. Restrictions: Follow existing patterns. _Requirements: 3.3–3.6, 7.1–7.5. Success: Compiles; analyzer clean. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 4. Slim MCalThemeData and apply renames
  - File: `lib/src/styles/mcal_theme.dart`
  - **Remove 13 properties**: `eventTileBackgroundColor`, `eventTileTextStyle`, `eventTileCornerRadius`, `eventTileHorizontalSpacing`, `hoverEventBackgroundColor`, `eventTileLightContrastColor`, `eventTileDarkContrastColor`, `weekNumberTextStyle`, `weekNumberBackgroundColor`, `allDayEventBackgroundColor`, `allDayEventTextStyle`, `allDayEventBorderColor`, `allDayEventBorderWidth`. Remove from field declarations, constructor, `fromTheme`, `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode`.
  - **Rename** `dayTheme` → `dayViewTheme` (type: `MCalDayViewThemeData?`).
  - **Rename** `ignoreEventColors` → `enableEventColorOverrides` (bool, default: `false`).
  - **Add** `navigatorPadding` (EdgeInsets?) with default `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8.0, vertical: 8.0)` in `fromTheme`.
  - Update `fromTheme` to populate only 8 properties + sub-themes via `MCalDayViewThemeData.defaults(theme)` and `MCalMonthThemeData.defaults(theme)`.
  - Update `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode` for 8 properties.
  - Update `_lerpDayTheme` to use `MCalDayViewThemeData` type.
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalThemeData patterns; design doc Component 4._
  - _Requirements: 1.2, 2.1, 2.4, 2.5, 3.7, 5.2, 8.1, 8.2, 8.3_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter theme developer. Task: (A) Remove 13 properties from MCalThemeData (eventTileBackgroundColor, eventTileTextStyle, eventTileCornerRadius, eventTileHorizontalSpacing, hoverEventBackgroundColor, eventTileLightContrastColor, eventTileDarkContrastColor, weekNumberTextStyle, weekNumberBackgroundColor, allDayEventBackgroundColor, allDayEventTextStyle, allDayEventBorderColor, allDayEventBorderWidth). Remove from fields, constructor, fromTheme, copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode. (B) Rename dayTheme → dayViewTheme (update type to MCalDayViewThemeData?). (C) Rename ignoreEventColors → enableEventColorOverrides (same bool, same default false). (D) Add navigatorPadding (EdgeInsets?) field, constructor param, fromTheme default EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8.0, vertical: 8.0). (E) Update fromTheme to create dayViewTheme: MCalDayViewThemeData.defaults(theme) and monthTheme: MCalMonthThemeData.defaults(theme). (F) Update copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode for 8 properties. (G) Update _lerpDayTheme type to MCalDayViewThemeData. Restrictions: Do not change MCalTheme.of() behavior. This will break existing code referencing old property names — expected; fixed in later tasks. _Requirements: 1.2, 2.1, 2.4, 2.5, 3.7, 5.2, 8.1–8.3. Success: MCalThemeData compiles with 8 properties + sub-themes. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 5. Update cascade utils and exports
  - Files: `lib/src/utils/theme_cascade_utils.dart`, `lib/multi_calendar.dart`
  - In `theme_cascade_utils.dart`: rename the `ignoreEventColors` parameter to `enableEventColorOverrides` in `resolveEventTileColor`, `resolveDropTargetTileColor`. No logic change.
  - In `lib/multi_calendar.dart`: add exports for `mcal_event_tile_theme_mixin.dart`, `mcal_time_grid_theme_mixin.dart`, `mcal_all_day_theme_mixin.dart`. Update export from `mcal_day_theme_data.dart` to `mcal_day_view_theme_data.dart`.
  - _Leverage: Existing cascade utils, multi_calendar.dart._
  - _Requirements: 2.4, 1.4_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Dart developer. Task: (1) In theme_cascade_utils.dart: rename ignoreEventColors parameter to enableEventColorOverrides in resolveEventTileColor and resolveDropTargetTileColor. Update dartdoc references. No logic change. (2) In lib/multi_calendar.dart: add exports for the 3 new mixin files (mcal_event_tile_theme_mixin.dart, mcal_time_grid_theme_mixin.dart, mcal_all_day_theme_mixin.dart). Update the mcal_day_theme_data.dart export to mcal_day_view_theme_data.dart. Restrictions: No logic changes to cascade functions. _Requirements: 2.4, 1.4. Success: Compiles; exports are correct. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

## Phase 3: Day View widget migrations

- [ ] 6. Update Day View navigators and day header
  - Files: `lib/src/widgets/day_subwidgets/day_navigator.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/day_subwidgets/day_header.dart`
  - In `day_navigator.dart`: replace hardcoded `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8.0, vertical: 8.0)` with `theme.navigatorPadding ?? defaults.navigatorPadding!`.
  - In `day_header.dart`: replace 4 hardcoded values — `EdgeInsets.all(8.0)` → `dayHeaderPadding`, `SizedBox(width: 8)` → `dayHeaderSpacing`, `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2)` → `dayHeaderWeekNumberPadding`, `BorderRadius.circular(4)` → `dayHeaderWeekNumberBorderRadius`. All read from `theme.dayViewTheme?.{prop} ?? defaults.dayViewTheme!.{prop}!`. Update all `theme.dayTheme` references to `theme.dayViewTheme`.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Widget Migration table._
  - _Requirements: 8.1 (navigatorPadding), 6.2, 9.1, 9.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: (1) day_navigator.dart: obtain defaults = MCalThemeData.fromTheme(Theme.of(context)). Replace hardcoded EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8.0, vertical: 8.0) with theme.navigatorPadding ?? defaults.navigatorPadding!. (2) day_header.dart: replace hardcoded EdgeInsets.all(8.0) with theme.dayViewTheme?.dayHeaderPadding ?? defaults.dayViewTheme!.dayHeaderPadding!. Replace SizedBox(width: 8) spacers with theme.dayViewTheme?.dayHeaderSpacing ?? defaults.dayViewTheme!.dayHeaderSpacing!. Replace EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2) with dayHeaderWeekNumberPadding. Replace BorderRadius.circular(4) with dayHeaderWeekNumberBorderRadius. Update all theme.dayTheme references to theme.dayViewTheme. Restrictions: No hardcoded layout values in these files after changes. _Requirements: 6.2, 8.1, 9.1, 9.2. Success: Zero hardcoded layout values; dayTheme → dayViewTheme. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 7. Update Day View time grid widgets
  - Files: `lib/src/widgets/day_subwidgets/time_legend_column.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/day_subwidgets/time_grid_events_layer.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/day_subwidgets/time_regions_layer.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/shared_subwidgets/time_resize_handle.dart`
  - In `time_legend_column.dart`: replace hardcoded `_labelHeight = 20.0` with `timeLegendLabelHeight` from `dayViewTheme`.
  - In `time_grid_events_layer.dart`: replace hardcoded `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 2.0, vertical: 1.0)` → `timedEventMargin`, `2` → `timedEventKeyboardFocusBorderWidth`, `10` → `timedEventCompactFontSize`, `12` → `timedEventNormalFontSize`, `1.0` border → `eventTileBorderWidth`/`eventTileBorderColor`. Update cascade calls: `ignoreEventColors` → `enableEventColorOverrides`, property source from parent to `dayViewTheme`.
  - In `time_regions_layer.dart`: replace `width: 1` → `timeRegionBorderWidth`, `size: 16` → `timeRegionIconSize`, `SizedBox(width: 4)` → `timeRegionIconGap`.
  - In `time_resize_handle.dart`: replace `height: 2` → `resizeHandleVisualHeight`, `margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4)` → `resizeHandleHorizontalMargin`, `BorderRadius.circular(1)` → `resizeHandleBorderRadius`. Update `width: tileWidth - 8` to use `tileWidth - (resizeHandleHorizontalMargin * 2)`.
  - Update all `theme.dayTheme` → `theme.dayViewTheme` and event tile property sources from parent to `dayViewTheme`.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Widget Migration table and MCalTimeGridThemeMixin table._
  - _Requirements: 3.8, 4.2, 9.1, 9.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: Update 4 Day View time grid files. In each: obtain defaults. (1) time_legend_column.dart: replace hardcoded 20.0 (_labelHeight) with theme.dayViewTheme?.timeLegendLabelHeight ?? defaults.dayViewTheme!.timeLegendLabelHeight!. (2) time_grid_events_layer.dart: replace hardcoded EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 2.0, vertical: 1.0) with timedEventMargin; 2 (keyboard focus border) with timedEventKeyboardFocusBorderWidth; 10 (compact font) with timedEventCompactFontSize; 12 (normal font) with timedEventNormalFontSize; 1.0 border with eventTileBorderWidth/eventTileBorderColor from dayViewTheme. Update cascade calls: ignoreEventColors → enableEventColorOverrides; themeColor source from parent to dayViewTheme. (3) time_regions_layer.dart: replace width:1 with timeRegionBorderWidth; size:16 with timeRegionIconSize; SizedBox(width:4) with timeRegionIconGap. (4) time_resize_handle.dart: accept new params or read from theme; replace height:2 with resizeHandleVisualHeight; replace margin horizontal 4 with resizeHandleHorizontalMargin; replace BorderRadius.circular(1) with resizeHandleBorderRadius; update width calculation to tileWidth - (margin * 2). Update all dayTheme → dayViewTheme. Restrictions: Zero hardcoded layout values. _Requirements: 3.8, 4.2, 9.1, 9.2. Success: Zero hardcoded values in these files. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 8. Update Day View all-day events section
  - File: `lib/src/widgets/day_subwidgets/all_day_events_section.dart`
  - Replace 9 hardcoded values: `_wrapSpacing = 4.0` → `allDayWrapSpacing`, `_wrapRunSpacing = 4.0` → `allDayWrapRunSpacing`, `_sectionHPadding = 8.0` / `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8.0, vertical: 4.0)` → `allDaySectionPadding`, `2` (keyboard focus border) → `allDayKeyboardFocusBorderWidth`, `width: 3` → `allDayOverflowHandleWidth`, `height: 16` → `allDayOverflowHandleHeight`, `BorderRadius.circular(1.5)` → `allDayOverflowHandleBorderRadius`, `SizedBox(width: 4)` → `allDayOverflowHandleGap`, `fontSize: 11` → `allDayOverflowIndicatorFontSize`.
  - Remove `_defaultTileWidth`, `_defaultTileHeight`, `_defaultOverflowWidth` constants — these are now in `defaults()` as `allDayTileWidth: 120.0`, `allDayTileHeight: 28.0`, `allDayOverflowIndicatorWidth: 80.0`.
  - Update all property reads from parent (`theme.allDayEventBackgroundColor`) to per-view (`theme.dayViewTheme?.allDayEventBackgroundColor`). Update `theme.dayTheme` → `theme.dayViewTheme`. Update cascade calls: `ignoreEventColors` → `enableEventColorOverrides`.
  - _Leverage: Design doc MCalAllDayThemeMixin table and Widget Migration._
  - _Requirements: 3.8, 5.3, 9.1, 9.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: Update all_day_events_section.dart. (1) Obtain defaults. (2) Replace 9 hardcoded values: _wrapSpacing/RunSpacing → allDayWrapSpacing/RunSpacing; _sectionHPadding + EdgeInsets → allDaySectionPadding; keyboard focus 2 → allDayKeyboardFocusBorderWidth; overflow handle width 3, height 16, radius 1.5, gap 4 → allDayOverflowHandle* properties; fontSize 11 → allDayOverflowIndicatorFontSize. All from theme.dayViewTheme?.{prop} ?? defaults.dayViewTheme!.{prop}!. (3) Remove _defaultTileWidth/_defaultTileHeight/_defaultOverflowWidth constants; tile size now from theme.dayViewTheme?.allDayTileWidth ?? defaults.dayViewTheme!.allDayTileWidth!. (4) Update parent property reads (theme.allDayEventBackgroundColor → theme.dayViewTheme?.allDayEventBackgroundColor). (5) Update dayTheme → dayViewTheme. (6) Update cascade: ignoreEventColors → enableEventColorOverrides. Restrictions: Zero hardcoded layout values. _Requirements: 3.8, 5.3, 9.1, 9.2. Success: Zero hardcoded values; all-day properties from dayViewTheme. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

## Phase 4: Month View widget migrations

- [ ] 9. Update Month View navigator, weekday header, and week number cell
  - Files: `lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/month_navigator_widget.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/weekday_header_row_widget.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/week_number_cell.dart`
  - In `month_navigator_widget.dart`: replace hardcoded `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8.0, vertical: 8.0)` with `theme.navigatorPadding ?? defaults.navigatorPadding!`.
  - In `weekday_header_row_widget.dart`: replace hardcoded `EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8.0, horizontal: 2.0)` with `theme.monthTheme?.weekdayHeaderPadding ?? defaults.monthTheme!.weekdayHeaderPadding!`.
  - In `week_number_cell.dart`: replace hardcoded `36.0` → `weekNumberColumnWidth`, `width: 0.5` → `weekNumberBorderWidth`, from `monthTheme`.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Widget Migration table._
  - _Requirements: 8.1 (navigatorPadding), 7.4, 9.1, 9.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: (1) month_navigator_widget.dart: obtain defaults; replace hardcoded navigator padding with theme.navigatorPadding ?? defaults.navigatorPadding!. (2) weekday_header_row_widget.dart: replace hardcoded EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8.0, horizontal: 2.0) with theme.monthTheme?.weekdayHeaderPadding ?? defaults.monthTheme!.weekdayHeaderPadding!. (3) week_number_cell.dart: replace 36.0 with theme.monthTheme?.weekNumberColumnWidth ?? defaults.monthTheme!.weekNumberColumnWidth!; replace 0.5 border width with weekNumberBorderWidth. Restrictions: Zero hardcoded layout values in these files. _Requirements: 7.4, 8.1, 9.1, 9.2. Success: Zero hardcoded values. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 10. Update Month View day_cell_widget and week_row_widget
  - Files: `lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/day_cell_widget.dart`, `lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/week_row_widget.dart`
  - In `day_cell_widget.dart`: replace 6 hardcoded values — `EdgeInsets.only(left: 4.0, top: 4.0, right: 4.0)` → `dateLabelPadding`, `width: 1.0` → `cellBorderWidth`, `EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 2.0)` → `regionContentPadding`, `size: 9.0` → `regionIconSize`, `SizedBox(width: 2)` → `regionIconGap`, `fontSize: 8.0` → `regionFontSize`, all from `monthTheme`.
  - In `week_row_widget.dart`: replace `2.0` (selected state) → `keyboardSelectionBorderWidth`, `1.5` (highlighted state) → `keyboardHighlightBorderWidth`, `24` → `dateLabelCircleSize`, all from `monthTheme`. Update cascade calls: `ignoreEventColors` → `enableEventColorOverrides`; event tile property sources from parent to `monthTheme`. Update `theme.eventTileHorizontalSpacing ?? 2.0` fallback to use `theme.monthTheme?.eventTileHorizontalSpacing ?? defaults.monthTheme!.eventTileHorizontalSpacing!`.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Widget Migration table._
  - _Requirements: 3.8, 7.4, 9.1, 9.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-layout-future-views, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: (1) day_cell_widget.dart: obtain defaults; replace 6 hardcoded values with theme.monthTheme?.{prop} ?? defaults.monthTheme!.{prop}!: dateLabelPadding, cellBorderWidth, regionContentPadding, regionIconSize, regionIconGap, regionFontSize.
